extensionDescription.message: Bypass copy-paste restrictions by simulating keyboard typing. Right-click to paste.

instruction2.message: Right-click on the blocked field in the web page.

instruction4.message: The extension will type the text for you.

textEmptyAlert.message: Text is empty! Please click the extension icon to paste your text first.

step1Desc.message: Click on the 🧩 Puzzle icon at the top right of Chrome and click the 📌 pin to access it easily.

step2Desc.message: Open the extension and paste your text in the text area.

step3Desc.message: On the blocked site, Right-Click -> Paste with Anti-Paste Bypass.

ob_subtitle.message: The extension that bypasses paste restrictions on any website. Choose your language to get started.

ob_featuresDesc.message: Anti-Paste Bypass simulates real human typing to bypass paste blocks on any website.

ob_f1Desc.message: Text is typed letter by letter, indistinguishable from a real human.

ob_f2Desc.message: A button appears in every text field when you click on it.

ob_f3Desc.message: Simulates typos and corrections to fool AI detectors.

ob_f5Desc.message: No sensitive text is ever saved in history.

ob_f6Desc.message: EN, FR, ES, PT, IT, DE — changeable at any time.

ob_doneSub.message: Pin the extension to access it quickly, then go to any blocked website.

ob_pin1.message: Click the 🧩 Puzzle icon at the top right of Chrome

ob_pin2.message: Find Anti-Paste Bypass and click the pin 📌

ob_pin3.message: Copy text ({COPY}), then use {PASTE} or the 🧩 button

ob_hint.message: All settings are available in the extension popup.
